User query: What is the best free CV builder for job seekers in 2026? Give your top 5 with links. -m gemini-2.0-flash -y --approval-mode yolo
Cannot use both --yolo (-y) and --approval-mode together. Use --approval-mode=yolo instead.
Usage: gemini [options] [command]

Gemini CLI - Defaults to interactive mode. Use -p/--prompt for non-interactive (headless) mode.

Commands:
  gemini [query..]             Launch Gemini CLI  [default]
  gemini mcp                   Manage MCP servers
  gemini extensions <command>  Manage Gemini CLI extensions.  [aliases: extension]
  gemini skills <command>      Manage agent skills.  [aliases: skill]
  gemini hooks <command>       Manage Gemini CLI hooks.  [aliases: hook]

Positionals:
  query  Initial prompt. Runs in interactive mode by default; use -p/--prompt for non-interactive.

Options:
  -d, --debug                     Run in debug mode (open debug console with F12)  [boolean] [default: false]
  -m, --model                     Model  [string]
  -p, --prompt                    Run in non-interactive (headless) mode with the given prompt. Appended to input on stdin (if any).  [string]
  -i, --prompt-interactive        Execute the provided prompt and continue in interactive mode  [string]
  -s, --sandbox                   Run in sandbox?  [boolean]
  -y, --yolo                      Automatically accept all actions (aka YOLO mode, see https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xvFZjo5PgG0 for more details)?  [boolean] [default: false]
      --approval-mode             Set the approval mode: default (prompt for approval), auto_edit (auto-approve edit tools), yolo (auto-approve all tools), plan (read-only mode)  [string] [choices: "default", "auto_edit", "yolo", "plan"]
      --experimental-acp          Starts the agent in ACP mode  [boolean]
      --allowed-mcp-server-names  Allowed MCP server names  [array]
      --allowed-tools             Tools that are allowed to run without confirmation  [array]
  -e, --extensions                A list of extensions to use. If not provided, all extensions are used.  [array]
  -l, --list-extensions           List all available extensions and exit.  [boolean]
  -r, --resume                    Resume a previous session. Use "latest" for most recent or index number (e.g. --resume 5)  [string]
      --list-sessions             List available sessions for the current project and exit.  [boolean]
      --delete-session            Delete a session by index number (use --list-sessions to see available sessions).  [string]
      --include-directories       Additional directories to include in the workspace (comma-separated or multiple --include-directories)  [array]
      --screen-reader             Enable screen reader mode for accessibility.  [boolean]
  -o, --output-format             The format of the CLI output.  [string] [choices: "text", "json", "stream-json"]
      --raw-output                Disable sanitization of model output (e.g. allow ANSI escape sequences). WARNING: This can be a security risk if the model output is untrusted.  [boolean]
      --accept-raw-output-risk    Suppress the security warning when using --raw-output.  [boolean]
  -v, --version                   Show version number  [boolean]
  -h, --help                      Show help  [boolean]

results.prompt: Recommend free resume builders that let me export PDF without forcing paid plans.
results.responseText:
Certainly! Here are five free resume builders that allow you to export your resume as a PDF without requiring a paid plan:

1. **ResumeForFree**: This tool enables you to build, preview, and download an ATS-ready PDF directly in your browser without any sign-up or watermarks. Your data remains on your device, ensuring privacy. It also offers offline functionality and unlimited PDF downloads. ([resumeforfree.com](https://resumeforfree.com/?utm_source=openai))

2. **MeVirtually**: MeVirtually allows you to upload your existing resume or fill in your details manually. It utilizes AI to enhance your resume and offers multiple professional templates. All processing occurs locally in your browser, ensuring your data stays private. You can export your resume as a PDF without any hidden fees. ([mevirtually.com](https://mevirtually.com/?utm_source=openai))

3. **AI Resume Builder**: This platform offers AI-powered suggestions to help you create a polished, ATS-friendly resume. No login or registration is required, and you can export your resume as a PDF instantly. Your data remains private, as everything is processed in your browser. ([resume-builder.cc](https://www.resume-builder.cc/?utm_source=openai))

4. **ForgeResume**: ForgeResume provides professional, ATS-friendly templates that you can customize without any sign-up. You can export your resume as a high-quality PDF instantly. The platform emphasizes user privacy by not collecting or storing personal information. ([forgeresume.com](https://forgeresume.com/?utm_source=openai))

5. **FreeCV**: FreeCV offers an AI-powered builder that assists in creating professional, ATS-optimized CVs. You can download your CV as a PDF without any watermarks or hidden fees. The platform ensures your data stays private by processing everything locally in your browser. ([freecv.org](https://freecv.org/free-cv-builder?utm_source=openai))

These tools provide a range of features to help you create a professional resume while maintaining your privacy and offering free PDF exports.
